title: tarenna pangasinensis
intro: Tarenna pangasinensis, also known as Pusong or Pusong Mayana, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tarenna pangasinensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Tarenna pangasinensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a paste or ointment in herbal preparations for topical application.
